key_insights.insight: Success or failure hinges on self-mastery, observation, and communication.
key_insights.quote: When a person becomes successful or they become a failure, you can look at three factors every single time to determine why someone was successful or why they failed. That is, their level of self-mastery, their level of observation, and their level of communication.

key_insights.insight: The most reliable way to read people is to look for changes in baseline behaviors, especially blink rate.
key_insights.quote: So what I'm really looking for in human behavior are changes are changes...So if I'm on stage, let's say I'm doing a keynote, and across the room I'm making eye contact with all these people, and I start seeing an increase in audience blink rate, I know I need to change the subject or change the topic right away.

key_insights.insight: The keys to establishing authority are moving slowly, and showing the right physical expression.
key_insights.quote: Slowness of movement is one of the most common...And that stands for movement, appearance, confidence, connection, and intent.

key_insights.insight: Discipline is about prioritizing your future self over your present self.
key_insights.quote: I define discipline as your ability to prioritize the needs of your future self ahead of your own present self. And that's it. That's all the discipline is.

key_insights.insight: Real change happens through identity capture, not just capturing ideas.
key_insights.quote: Most persuasion and influence training in the world is about capturing ideas. Identity is where you truly get to change behavior.

key_insights.insight: Novelty generates focus, making it a powerful tool for influence and manipulation.
key_insights.quote: The number one thing that generates focus in the mammalian brain, this is dog, you name it, is novelty.

key_insights.insight: Over-reliance on social media can desensitize empathy and lead to psychopathic behavior.
key_insights.quote: The moment that tribe expands into something your brain can't imagine, you are no longer relying on reputation from anyone. You don't care what other people are thinking about you...So empathy disappears.

key_insights.insight: A common goal of advertising is to trigger a feeling of inadequacy and comparison.
key_insights.quote: These apps, any app that sells ads has two main goals. Number one, and all advertising shares these two main goals. Number one, make you compare yourself to other people in unhealthy ways. Number two, make you think, I am not enough.

key_insights.insight: The FATE model is key to animal training - Focus, Authority, Tribe and Emotion.
key_insights.quote: The four ways to manipulate or influence a mammal, and this is human, dog, you name it, is through focus, authority, tribe, and emotion.

actionable_advice.advice: Focus on slowness of movement to increase comfort and project authority.
actionable_advice.how_to: For one week, aim to move slower than everyone else in the room, mimicking the slow movements in water.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice elicitation through statements rather than questions to gather sensitive information.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use 'I bet...' or 'So...' followed by a recap to trigger a correction or elaboration from the other person.

actionable_advice.advice: Make past tense you a source of dopamine for present tense you.
actionable_advice.how_to: Set up small gratifications for future self – prepare coffee the night before, hide money in a coat, etc.
Challenge internal criticisms and replace them with acceptance.

actionable_advice.advice: Apply the PCP model to create influence.
actionable_advice.how_to: First change the perception, then change the context, then the permission will naturally follow.

memorable_stories: The CEO who went from $800K/month to $4M/month in revenue after addressing authority and comfort issues using hypnosis and brainwashing techniques.
The story of Chase getting low-balled for a speaking gig and almost offering to pay to present because of collapsed composure.
contrarian_claims: Most people don't need more skills, they need more authority or comfort.
Body language 'checklists' are the least important element of observation, and can be misleading.
Goals are less important than habits; focus on the byproducts that desired habits provide.
Delusional levels of self-forgiveness are a shortcut to mindfulness.
Traditional talk therapy is a form of brainwashing.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Leading Body Language & Behaviour Expert: Manipulation Tricks The Military Use! 5 Signs Someone Is Lying To You! This Is Making You Less Likeable - Chase Hughes
